caption: The video features a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white vest over a beige shirt, and he has a white beard and glasses. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative column to his right adorned with red flowers. As he speaks, he gestures with his right hand, raising it for emphasis. The setting appears formal, likely a press conference or an official event, given the presence of microphones on the podium. His demeanor suggests that he is addressing an important topic, engaging with his audience through both his words and body language.
